markdown:
# Horn of Valhalla, Silver

- **Type**: INS|XPHB

You can take a [[magic]] action to blow this horn. In response, warrior spirits from the plane of Ysgard appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet of you. Each spirit uses the Berserker stat block and returns to Ysgard after 1 hour or when it drops to 0 [[hit_points Points]]. The spirits look like living, breathing warriors, and they have [[immunity]] to the [[charmed]] and [[frightened]] conditions. Once you use the horn, it can't be used again until 7 days have passed.

A silver horn summons 2 Berserker. They are [[friendly_attitude]] to you and your allies and follow your commands.
